Class LockedDoor

java.lang.Object
generation.map.Cell
generation.map.Wall
generation.map.LockedDoor
public class LockedDoor extends Wall
Represents a locked door cell in the game map. A locked door acts as a wall until it is unlocked with the correct key.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    LockedDoor(int[] position, String requiredKey)
    Constructs a new LockedDoor at the given position.

    getRequiredKey()
    Gets the key required to unlock this door.

    Checks whether the door is currently locked.
    void
    unlock()
    Unlocks the door, making it passable.

  • Constructor Details

    • LockedDoor

      public LockedDoor(int[] position, String requiredKey)
      Constructs a new LockedDoor at the given position.
      Parameters:
      position - The grid coordinates {row, col} of this door.
      requiredKey - The key string that must be provided to unlock this door.

  • Method Details

    • unlock

      public void unlock()
      Unlocks the door, making it passable.

    • isLocked

      public boolean isLocked()
      Checks whether the door is currently locked.
      Returns:
      true if the door is locked, false otherwise.

    • getRequiredKey

      public String getRequiredKey()
      Gets the key required to unlock this door.
      Returns:
      The required key string.
